title: Reformat Text Widget Text in Item Card View to White in Dark/Night Mode
excerpt: The current text color for Text Widgets (not Information Widgets) in Dark/Night Mode is not easily readable: it appears the coding wasn’t changed for the text color to account for the darker background color, rendering t…

posts.author: zsbarnard (Zach Barnard (Altair Global))
posts.cookedHtml: The current text color for Text Widgets (not Information Widgets) in Dark/Night Mode is not easily readable: it appears the coding wasn’t changed for the text color to account for the darker background color, rendering this text next to impossible to read. If it could be changed to brighter white, that would make these widgets more easily readable.
